products.name: Wind Down Tea
products.shortDescription: Chamomile and lavender loose-leaf with clean-dissolving CBD.
products.description: A floral tea blend with chamomile, lavender, and lemon balm. This batch is designed for a smooth wind-down without heavy sweetness or artificial flavoring.
products.howToUse: Use 1 tablespoon per cup. Steep 5-7 minutes in hot water, strain, then add honey if desired. Start with one cup and adjust based on your routine.
products.imageAlt: Amber Hour Wind Down Tea tin with loose leaves and chamomile blossoms

products.name: Two-Way Candle
products.shortDescription: Low-melt soy candle that doubles as warm massage oil.
products.description: A low-melt soy and coconut candle made for both scent and skin use. After burning, the top layer melts into a warm oil blend that can be used for shoulder, neck, or hand massage.
products.howToUse: Burn 10-20 minutes until a wax pool forms. Blow out the flame, wait briefly, test temperature, then apply a small amount to skin. Never apply while too hot.
products.imageAlt: Amber Hour Two-Way Candle in amber glass with cedar notes

products.name: Raw CBD Honey
products.shortDescription: Never boiled, fully emulsified honey for tea or toast.
products.description: Small-batch infused honey made for even consistency and easy dosing in everyday foods and drinks.
products.howToUse: Start with 1 teaspoon in tea, yogurt, or on toast. Wait and gauge effect before increasing to a larger serving.
products.imageAlt: Amber Hour Raw CBD Honey jar with wooden dipper

products.name: Roll-On Balm
products.shortDescription: Pocket roll-on for neck and wrist in seconds.
products.description: A pocket roll-on blend for quick topical use on wrists, neck, and temples. Designed for simple daily carry with a clean, non-greasy finish.
products.howToUse: Apply 2-3 passes to wrists, neck, or temples. Let it absorb for 1-2 minutes before reapplying. For external use only.
products.imageAlt: Amber Hour Roll-On Balm bottle with silver roller ball
